findings.description: Mary Rossi married Charles A. Ulrich (Ullricht) on 2 February 1899 in Hoboken, Hudson County, New Jersey. The marriage date is the answer.

details.place: Hoboken, Hudson, New Jersey, United States

supporting_sources: New Jersey, Marriages, 1678-1985 — entry for Charles A. Ulrich and Mary/Maria Rossi, 2 Feb 1899, Hoboken, Hudson County, New Jersey.
New York, New York City Marriage Records, 1829-1938 — Mary Rossi marriage.
